news.title:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.
news.summary:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' Royal Enfield sold 100,905 units in Feb'26, up 11% YoY.
Domestic sales grew 13%, exports fell 2%, with YTD sales up 24% to 11.26L units.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' Royal Enfield sold 100,905 units in Feb'26, up 11% YoY.
Domestic sales grew 13%, exports fell 2%, with YTD sales up 24% to 11.26L units.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' trucks & buses volumes rose 23.5% YoY in Feb '26.
Domestic trucks grew 41.3%, SCV grew 54.1%, buses declined 21.4%; exports up 8.9% YoY.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' trucks & buses volumes rose 23.5% YoY in Feb '26.
Domestic trucks grew 41.3%, SCV grew 54.1%, buses declined 21.4%; exports up 8.9% YoY.

news.title:
Eicher Motors reported Feb'26 VECV sales at 9,986 units, up 23.4% YoY.
YTD sales for VECV reached 90,184 units, marking a 15.5% annual growth.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors reported Feb'26 VECV sales at 9,986 units, up 23.4% YoY.
YTD sales for VECV reached 90,184 units, marking a 15.5% annual growth.

news.title: Goldman Sachs raises Eicher Motors' target price to ₹9,200.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs raises Eicher Motors' target price to ₹9,200.

news.title:
Eicher Motors Q3 FY26 revenue rose 23% YoY to INR 6,114 cr; PAT up 21%.
Board approved INR 958 cr capex for Cheyyar plant, doubling capacity to 20L units/year.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors Q3 FY26 revenue rose 23% YoY to INR 6,114 cr; PAT up 21%.
Board approved INR 958 cr capex for Cheyyar plant, doubling capacity to 20L units/year.

news.title: Eicher Motors executed an NSE block trade of ~20,990 shares at Rs. 8,055, totaling Rs. 16.9 Cr.
news.summary: Eicher Motors executed an NSE block trade of ~20,990 shares at Rs. 8,055, totaling Rs. 16.9 Cr.

The report was highlighted on CNBC TV18.

Coal India and TCS drag, while Nifty stands at 25,960.

news.title:
HSBC retains buy rating on Eicher Motors, sets target price at ₹8,200.
Strong Q3 performance and focus on volume growth over margin cited.
news.summary:

news.title:
Jubilant Food and Eicher Motors to react to Q3 earnings.
Lenskart and M&M remain in focus for market updates.
news.summary:

news.title:
Eicher Motors shared Q3 FY26 results call audio on Feb 10, 2026.
The call covered financials for Dec 31, 2025, per disclosure norms.
news.summary:

news.title:
Eicher Motors plans to increase motorcycle production to 2M units annually.
Production ramp-up will start in Q1 FY 2026-27, completing by FY 2027-28.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors plans to increase motorcycle production to 2M units annually.
Production ramp-up will start in Q1 FY 2026-27, completing by FY 2027-28.

news.title:
Eicher Motors reports strong results with 44.8% net sales growth and 24.5% net profit rise YoY.
Record quarterly revenue achieved, but rising costs caused margin pressures affecting profitability.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors reports strong results with 44.8% net sales growth and 24.5% net profit rise YoY.
Record quarterly revenue achieved, but rising costs caused margin pressures affecting profitability.

news.title:
Eicher Motors board approved expanding Royal Enfield capacity to 2M units/year.
The Rs. 958 crore investment will be funded through internal accruals.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors board approved expanding Royal Enfield capacity to 2M units/year.
The Rs. 958 crore investment will be funded through internal accruals.

news.title:
Eicher Motors Q3 FY26 profit may rise 18% YoY to ₹1,380 crore; revenue up 22% YoY to ₹6,050 crore.
Royal Enfield volumes may grow 21% YoY; standalone margin may dip 30 bps due to lower export share.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors Q3 FY26 profit may rise 18% YoY to ₹1,380 crore; revenue up 22% YoY to ₹6,050 crore.
Royal Enfield volumes may grow 21% YoY; standalone margin may dip 30 bps due to lower export share.

news.title:
Major Q3 results this week include Hindalco, ONGC, Britannia, M&M, and Ashok Leyland.
Other key companies reporting include Titan, IRCTC, Eicher Motors, Pfizer, and Apollo Hospitals.
news.summary:
Major Q3 results this week include Hindalco, ONGC, Britannia, M&M, and Ashok Leyland.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' VE Commercial Vehicles reported 25.3% sales growth in Jan 2026.
Domestic small commercial vehicles rose 42.6%, heavy-duty trucks 33.5%, while buses fell 11.4%.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' VE Commercial Vehicles reported 25.3% sales growth in Jan 2026.
Domestic small commercial vehicles rose 42.6%, heavy-duty trucks 33.5%, while buses fell 11.4%.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' January motorcycle sales rose to 1,04,322 units, up from 91,132 YoY.
Sales exceeded market estimate of 1,02,100 units, showcasing strong performance.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' January motorcycle sales rose to 1,04,322 units, up from 91,132 YoY.
Sales exceeded market estimate of 1,02,100 units, showcasing strong performance.

news.title:
Eicher Motors reported 14% YoY growth in Jan 2026 sales, reaching 1,04,322 units. Royal Enfield achieved 1 million YTD sales in 10 months.
Royal Enfield launched the Goan Classic 350, partnered with Krafton India for BGMI content, and introduced Gymkhana for advanced riding skills.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors reported 14% YoY growth in Jan 2026 sales, reaching 1,04,322 units. Royal Enfield achieved 1 million YTD sales in 10 months.
Royal Enfield launched the Goan Classic 350, partnered with Krafton India for BGMI content, and introduced Gymkhana for advanced riding skills.
